reviews.review_description: I have been waiting for this! A fencing game! It’s not really a game but I like the graphics. Giving you 5 star even tho this is not a 5 star game! Please add features. PvP would be awesome! Just detecting the hit would be enough
ok im a real fencer in real life its quite a quick pace learning game its very good

This is horrible and for the price they're asking, it's even worse. it's really not even a demo. You have to create an account online and then that will activate the demo but the demo won't work without paying first. It costs more monthly than real lessons at a real fencing school. This is so bad it's frustrating.
Every body really wants to play this, can you please make it playable.
Its costs as much yearly as a small car, and you can't even try the demo. I am ashamed to have this in my library now...
The full game literally costs thousands of dollars lmao
I tried restarting with the setting on also it's not even a demo you need to pay a subscription to do anything.

You can’t even play without getting an activation key and how do you get one, nobody knows because it doesn’t tell you and also you shouldn’t need and activation key to play because that’s just stupid.

So  wanted to try this out yet you need some sort of pass code to access  even the demo.
Not worth it at all.😡
Would give it zero  stars If I could.

I gave this developer 6 bucks on itch.io when it was virtual Olympics.  Now it's updated to applab and requires a key to use got to fencervr.com and keys are 1400 use for yearly and 2500 for lifetime.  I could see a 10 dollar a month but like 110 a month that's insane you pay less than 100 a month for in person session at real fencing academy with free equipment rental.

Game was barely functional. I could barely do anything in the game and couldn't really figure out what to do. I think a fencing game would be cool to see and would lend well to VR format, but this is far from being functional right now. I hope they continue to work on making this an actual playable game.
You need a subscription

reviews.review_title: How do I get to get keys
reviews.review_description: The game doesn't tell me how to get to keys and I need it to play
This app is free for nothing, cannot run anything until you buy expansive key from other side. How secure to paid for that, I'm not wasting my time to buy the key.
As a fencer, i am very happy to try something like this. It has a lot of potencial! Keep going!!!
Cost money. Game sucks

This is not a free app. Its a demo app marauding as free app. You need to pay a substantial amount to unlock all features.

Update :

Ok, so now you add "demo" in the game title. Fair enough, maybe a tad too late but its a change in a right direction. Hopefully, we won't see anymore developer does this.

It says to put a key in for an app, but what app? And do I get the key from the app?????? 


Cant do nothing but poke tiny targets and it gets boring after 30 seconds
This is such a boring game there is no pvp or anything like it pls add a multiplayer mode ￼
Please add a fight mode and multiplayer
